evals.name: supported-tg-hdl-sdldl
evals.prompt: A high triglyceride-to-HDL ratio means I have small dense LDL and atherogenic dyslipidemia.
evals.expected_output: Verdict of Supported (likely moderate-strong), grounded in the atherogenic-dyslipidemia source-summary and related concept pages, citing [[wiki-links]] for the TG/HDL -> sdLDL mechanism. Should distinguish general research from his own logged panels.

evals.name: gap-fast-lowers-lpa
evals.prompt: My weekly 36-hour fast is lowering my Lp(a) over time.
evals.expected_output: Verdict of Inconclusive. The wiki has no evidence linking fasting to Lp(a) (Lp(a) is genetically determined). Should name the knowledge gap plainly and provide 3-6 searchable research keywords. Should not fabricate a mechanism from outside knowledge.

evals.name: grill-vague-fasting-heart
evals.prompt: I think fasting is good for my heart.
evals.expected_output: Hypothesis is vague (no biomarker, no direction, no scope). Skill should invoke /grill-me (or otherwise interview the user) to sharpen it before resolving, rather than guessing an interpretation and resolving against the wrong claim.
